# Features & Business Logic

## Knowledge Entry Status Workflow (Pending → Active → Outdated)

Knowledge entries have a status field that tracks their lifecycle. Entries can be marked as outdated when information becomes stale. This enables incremental knowledge base curation without deletion. The status field enables UI filtering and allows tracking which knowledge has been validated vs. automatically extracted.

_Source: `src/db/knowledge-entries.js`_

_Tags: `knowledge`, `status`, `workflow`, `database`_

## Prompt History with Event Flow Timeline

Prompt history lists all user turns with cost/token/duration summary. Per-prompt view shows ordered event flow timeline (which tools were invoked in sequence, with details and costs).

_Source: `CLAUDE.md`_

_Tags: `prompts`, `visualization`_

## Setup Scanner with Configuration Audit

Scanner audits Claude Code setup: checks installed skills, agents, rules, hooks, plugins, environment, dependencies. Reports issues by severity (critical/high/medium/low). Manually triggered or runs on install.

_Source: `README.md, CLAUDE.md`_

_Tags: `scanner`, `diagnostics`_

## Auto-Evolve Pattern Detection and Promotion

Observer detects repeating patterns in instinct files. Patterns with confidence >= 0.85 (no rejections, no blacklist hits) auto-promote to rule/skill/agent files in ~/.claude/. Can be reverted via UI. Blacklists agent and hook target types.

_Source: `README.md, CLAUDE.md`_

_Tags: `automation`, `learning`_

## Daily Review with Opus Analysis and Suggestions

Daily review at 3 AM reads all component files + work history + best practices. Invokes Opus for comprehensive analysis. Generates suggestions in daily_reviews table and markdown report in reports/. Suggestions can be accepted/dismissed. Manually triggerable via API.

_Source: `README.md, CLAUDE.md`_

_Tags: `automation`, `analysis`_

## Knowledge Entries Extraction and Vault Rendering

After each prompt ingestion, Haiku extracts project-specific understanding and stores in knowledge_entries table (category, title, body, source_file, status). Entries render as markdown files in <project>/.claude/knowledge/ per category. Content hashing skips unchanged content. Cold-start scan bootstraps from key files.

_Source: `README.md, CLAUDE.md`_

_Tags: `knowledge`, `extraction`_

## Project Scoping and Lifecycle Tracking

Projects registered in projects.json and cl_projects table. Per-project views: summary (sessions, cost, tools), timeline (weekly activity). Can delete project from DB/filesystem. Multi-project support with per-project knowledge entries.

_Source: `CLAUDE.md`_

_Tags: `projects`, `tracking`_

## Dashboard with Metric Cards and Charts

Dashboard displays: session count, total cost, model mix breakdown, tool/skill/agent usage rankings, cost over time chart. Real-time stats refreshed via API.

_Source: `README.md, CLAUDE.md`_

_Tags: `dashboard`, `visualization`_

## Inventory with Usage Stats and Pagination

Inventory tabs: skills and agents. Each component shows: invocation count, usage trends, trigger analysis (what triggers it, what it triggers), pagination (10 per page max 50), project filter, period filter.

_Source: `README.md, CLAUDE.md`_

_Tags: `inventory`, `components`_
